    // @effect-diagnostics effectFnIife:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      return yield* Effect.succeed(1)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    })()
    ~~~~
!!! warning TS377011: Effect.fn returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but here it's called immediately. Use Effect.gen instead with Effect.withSpan("preview") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
